stories.title: World Cup Power Rankings: Who are the front-runners with 48 hours to go?
stories.summary: With just 48 hours until the 2026 World Cup begins, our reporters ranked the top 15 contenders for this summer's top prize as they see it. Did your national team make the cut?

stories.title: Rams' Jackson faces domestic violence charge
stories.summary: Rams left tackle Alaric Jackson was arrested on a felony domestic violence charge Monday night, the Los Angeles Police Department confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Texas court sets Sorbsy-NCAA trial for February
stories.summary: The trial for Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby vs. the NCAA has been set to start two weeks after the CFP National Championship is scheduled to be played.

stories.title: Brown on FT gap: 'Never thought I'd see' in Finals...
stories.summary: Knicks coach Mike Brown criticized the officiating in Game 3 of the NBA Finals after the Spurs shot 24 free throws in the second half to New York's eight.

stories.title: Teen Russell, with Tiger's son on bag, makes Open
stories.summary: Teen Miles Russell, with Charlie Woods on his bag, was among those who endured "Golf's Longest Day" and qualified for next week's U.S. Open.
